zh.Asia, Manchester, Jamaika: 牙買加曼徹斯特亞西婭
zh.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod於1221年出生在蘇聯РоссияКалужская областьТаруса。她於1242年與Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa在俄羅斯Калужская областьТаруса結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年在她的家鄉享年33歲。

zh-hans.Asia, Manchester, Jamaika: 牙买加曼徹斯特亞西婭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod于1221年出生在苏联РоссияКалужская областьТаруса。她于1242年与Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa在俄罗斯Калужская областьТаруса结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年在她的家乡享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Marija
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfonso, Carlos, Luis, Miguel, Beatriz, Blanca, Dorita, Eduardo, Elena, Gonzalez, Jaime.  Italian Salvatore.
topographic name meaning ‘coast, coastal area’, or a habitational name from a place called Marina.

variants.name: Marin
meanings: Medieval variant of Mervyn , resulting from the regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. Modern use may represent a transferred use of the surname derived from this in the Middle Ages. It is popular in the United States, where it is associated in particular with the American singer Marvin Gaye ( 1939–84 ) and the boxer Marvin Hagler ( b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod was born in 1221, in Tarusa, Kaluga Oblast, Russia, Soviet Union. She married Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa in 1242, in tarusa, Kaluga Oblast, Russia. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1254, in her hometown, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod est née en 1221, à Tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russia, Union soviétique. Elle a épousé Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa en 1242, à tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1254, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans.

Sie hat 1242 in tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russland Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1254 im Alter von 33 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod è nata il nel 1221 nel Tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russia, Sowjetunion. Lei sposato Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa nel 1242, nel tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Russia. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1254, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.Asia, Manchester, Jamaika: ジャマイカマンチェスターアシア
ja.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorodは1221年にソビエト連邦РоссияКалужская областьТарусаで生まれた。1242年にロシアКалужская областьТарусаでYurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年に故郷で33歳で死去した。

ko.Tarusy, Rzhevskiy Uyezd, Tver, Empire ru: Российская империя Тверская Ржевский уезд Тарусы
ko.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod(은)는 1221년 소련 Россия Калужская область Таруса에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1242년 러시아 Калужская область Таруса에서 Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 그녀의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Marija Jaroslawna von Nowgorod родилась в 1221 г. в местности Таруса, Калужская область, Россия, Советский Союз. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa в 1242 г. в местности Таруса, Калужская область, Россия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1254 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 33 лет.

Se casó con Yurii Mihaylovich Rurik Prince of Tarusa en 1242, en tarusa, Kaluzhskaya Oblastʹ, Rusia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1254, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años.
